---
title: "THE ARTOMETRICS OF H3"
format:
  html:
    number-sections: false
    theme: none
    css: artometrics.css
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-title: "IN THIS REPORT"
    toc-location: left
    smooth-scroll: true
    embed-resources: true
  pdf:
    number-sections: false
editor:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---
